findings.description: Ralph Kennedy Quass (born 23 Feb 1891 in Palo, Linn, Iowa; died 27 Apr 1968 in Shell Rock, Butler, Iowa) was Kenneth Werner Quass's biological father.
supporting_sources: Iowa, County Births, 1880-1935 — lists Ralph Kennedy Quass as father of Kenneth Werner Quass, born 4 December 1917, Sumner, Bremer, Iowa
United States Census, 1920 — Kenneth (transcribed 'Ovass') in household of Ralph K Ovass and Emma Ovass, Sumner Township, Buchanan, Iowa
United States Census, 1930 — Kenneth Quass in household of Ralph K Quass and Emma W Quass, Sumner Township, Buchanan, Iowa

findings.description: Emma Wilhelmina Nehls (born 9 Nov 1894 in Middlefield, Buchanan, Iowa; died 13 Jan 1991 in Sumner, Bremer, Iowa) was Kenneth Werner Quass's biological mother.
supporting_sources: United States Census, 1920 — Kenneth in household of Ralph and Emma Quass (née Nehls), Sumner Township, Buchanan, Iowa
United States Census, 1930 — Kenneth Quass in household of Ralph K and Emma W Quass, Sumner Township, Buchanan, Iowa
